title: Figurines
description: A mod adding a specified set of Placeable Figurines, Plushies and more!
body:
# Figurines
## Quick Summary:
A mod adding a Figurine Block. This block adds a small statue which can then be posed with our new pose tool!



## Figurine:
The Figurine Block is a well a block that adds a small statue. It is easy to craft, simply needing three string in a column. It has no restrictions on where it can be placed.

To get different textures, simply renaming it with some of the names below! To see results check the gallery!

<details>
<summary>Ember House</summary>

Impura

Orrin

Cece

Arinn

</details>
<details>
<summary>The Magical School of Sir Gideon</summary>

Teacher Gideon

Student Armin

Student UMP

Awakened Impura

Awakened Orrin

</details>
<details>
<summary>The Feywinters</summary>

Arinn Feywinter

Luminara Feywinter

Lily Feywinter

</details>
<details>
<summary>Wicked Ensemble</summary>

Impurabita Tycha

Ompano Rubeshire

Empil

Robohedge

Cowboy Cowboy

Fantasma

Mayumi Sakanoue

Pefi

</details>


## Pose Tool:
The Pose Tool is meant to change the poses and sizes of the Figurine Block itself. The List is quite long so I suggest you test it out yourself! You can also check out the gallery for the large expanse of poses

The Pose Tool is unbreakable so all you need is two sticks! Place them in a shear crafting shape and it is complete!

Right Click the Figurine to change its pose!
Shift Right Click the Figurine to changes its size!



## Packager:
The Packager is a simple item mainly for creative. It is a moderation tool that turns the Figurines into a Package. Incase of a mass amount of Figurines. Breaking the Package drops the Figurine Item

## Want to add your own?
Fill the form below with the name of the pack of skins as well as uploading the skins used!

https://forms.gle/j7karad4oa88ntRJ6

### Creator Note:
The Large Figurine Blocks do go outside of their bounds which does mean it phases through blocks.

In creative mode, quick selecting with middle mouse on any poses or sizes will give a broken texture.

Credits:

Myself

KaupenJoe (Using his Fabric 1.21 modding tutorial)

To anyone skin creator to whoms skin I may have used when moshing some of my personal skins lol
